name: Transcriptor Fonax One
description: Transcriptor de llamadas en tiempo real con IA. Edición Local Multicanal.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' wss: https: wss://api.deepgram.com
